file_insights.insight: Two-stage card with fallback provider chain and differentiated model selection per stage
Clear stress test parameters with specific concurrency load and measurable outcomes
Uses standard template namespace for implement-stage cards
Empty placeholder icon; filename contains special character that may cause encoding issues on non-UTF8 systems

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent 8-file template: Icon, Info.plist, meta.json, spec.md, prompt.md, links.md, Logs.webloc, QuickLook/Thumbnail.png
Playing card glyphs (U+1F0xx) used in card IDs and metadata for visual differentiation
patterns_discovered.relevance: consistent with bop visual identity pattern mentioned in MEMORY.md

patterns_discovered.description: Cards define stage chains with per-stage model selection, budget, and provider assignment
patterns_discovered.relevance: enables cost optimization and model-stage matching

patterns_discovered.description: Three-tier fallback: claude → codex → ollama-local ensures work completion even if primary fails
meta.json lists cargo operations (test, clippy) while spec.md defines dispatch/reaper validation
patterns_discovered.relevance: different validation concerns in different stages

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Icon filename encoding with carriage return
gotchas_discovered.context: Icon\r in filenames may cause cross-platform compatibility issues
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: verify icon file handling in Quick Look thumbnail generation

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Unicode SMP glyph in directory path
gotchas_discovered.context: 🃂 character (U+1F0C2) in .cards/ path could cause issues in older systems or non-UTF8 environments
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: test on legacy systems; ensure dispatcher handles encoding correctly

gotchas_discovered.context: 3600s timeout is generous for <5min test target; could mask hanging processes
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: reduce timeout to 10 minutes for faster feedback on failures

gotchas_discovered.context: meta.json requires 'cargo test' + 'cargo clippy' but spec defines dispatcher/reaper validation
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: clarify whether stress test runs cargo in implementation stage or uses dispatcher directly

gotchas_discovered.context: spec requires orphan reaper validation but no script or mechanism specified for proving 'no orphaned ollama processes'
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: define pre/post test ps aux capture and comparison logic

discoveries.approach_outcome: SUCCESS - Card bundle created with complete metadata, spec, and prompt template structure. Card is ready for dispatcher queuing. All required files present and properly formatted for bop pipeline ingestion.

recommendations.action: Update spec.md acceptance criteria with explicit shell commands for verification (e.g., 'ps aux | grep -c ollama' baseline)
recommendations.rationale: QA stage needs deterministic validation method for orphan process checking

recommendations.action: Add resource requirements section to spec (CPU cores, RAM, disk for 10 concurrent ollama processes)
recommendations.rationale: Prevents resource exhaustion surprises on constrained CI systems

recommendations.action: Document expected log format for PID lifecycle tracking (spawn, exec, exit per card ID)
recommendations.rationale: Enables post-test analysis if race conditions or orphans detected

recommendations.action: Reduce timeout_seconds from 3600 to 600 (10 minutes) for faster fail feedback
recommendations.rationale: Aligns with <5 minute target and reduces false negatives from hanging processes

recommendations.action: Add guard in card creation logic to validate acceptance_criteria alignment between meta.json and spec.md
recommendations.rationale: Prevents cargo vs. dispatch validation confusion in future cards
